corrections.text: The article presents the phrase "removing the original assistant response and regenerating it with the model under evaluation" inside quotation marks as a direct quote from MarkTechPost. That exact wording does not appear in the cited article; MarkTechPost expresses the idea only in pseudocode comments ("# remove original assistant response" and "# regenerate with new model"), and the phrase "the model under evaluation" does not appear in the source at all. The underlying description of the method is accurate, but the passage should be read as a paraphrase rather than a verbatim quotation.
